OverHistory.NewCommentry: David Payne to Finn Allen - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Finn Allen plays an aggressive cover drive on the front foot for 4 runs towards Deep Extra Covers(Sweeper Cover)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Off the Mark is his own style!, David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Finn Allen carves this through the covers for a boundary to get off the mark! Bottom hand to great effect!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: David Payne to Finn Allen - FOUR RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, short of good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Finn Allen plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 4 runs towards Deep Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: One brings two as Allen goes bang bang!, David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, short of good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Finn Allen hangs back and nails the pull over mid-wicket for four more!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: David Payne to Finn Allen - SIX RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, full length ball, pitching on off stump, Finn Allen plays an aggressive lofted straight shot on the front foot for 6 runs towards Straight Long-On
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: Even Better this time!, David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, full length ball, pitching on off stump, Finn Allen hammers the loft this time, and it goes all the way over for a maximum!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: David Payne to Finn Allen - SIX RUNS !!!
OverHistory.Commentry: David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, short of good length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Finn Allen plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot for 6 runs towards Deep Mid-Wicket
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
This is the intent needed when you chase a huge total!, David Payne bowling to Finn Allen, short of good length ball, pitching outside leg stump, Finn Allen with the pull again and the ball sails over mid-wicket for a maximum!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Harsh Dubey to Finn Allen Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Harsh Dubey bowling to Finn Allen, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Finn Allen plays an aggressive lofted on drive on the front foot WICKET Finn Allen c&b Harsh Dubey (Kolkata Knight Riders 30 Runs for 1 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Spin does the trick as Allen departs after a short cameo!, Harsh Dubey bowls it full on off stump, Allen trying to go over the bowler as he strikes this hard, gets it in the toe-end of the bat as the ball goes straight to Dubey, who, with a good reflex, completes the return catch! Dubey, the man, has done it for SRH! Allen's struggle to spin continues! 

WICKET Finn Allen c&b Harsh Dubey (Kolkata Knight Riders 30 Runs for 1 wickets)

OverHistory.Commentry: Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Ajinkya Rahane, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Ajinkya Rahane plays an aggressive pull shot on the back foot WICKET Ajinkya Rahane c Eshan Malinga b Jaydev Unadkat (Kolkata Knight Riders 67 Runs for 2 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Unadkat Gets the better of Rahane for the fifth Time in the Tournament!, Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Ajinkya Rahane, good length ball, pitching on leg stump, Ajinkya Rahane gets on the back foot and goes for a pull, but he was way too early as the ball skews up high, Malinga sprints in at mid-wicket slides front and completes a good catch! 

WICKET Ajinkya Rahane c Eshan Malinga b Jaydev Unadkat (Kolkata Knight Riders 67 Runs for 2 wickets)

OverHistory.Commentry: Eshan Malinga bowling to Cameron Green, good length ball, pitching outside off stump, Cameron Green plays a defensive forward push for a single towards Pitch

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Eshan Malinga to Angkrish Raghuvanshi Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Eshan Malinga bowling to Angkrish Raghuvanshi, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Angkrish Raghuvanshi drives it straight aggressively using the front foot WICKET Cameron Green run out Eshan Malinga (Kolkata Knight Riders 74 Runs for 3 wickets) towards Pitch
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
Poor Game Awareness at the middle as Green departs just at the end of Powerplay!, Eshan Malinga bowls fuller on the off as Raghuvanshi hits this straight back to the bowler, the ball hits Malinga's shoes but did not travel faster, Malinga was quick enough to take the ball and dislodge the bails. Here is where the fumble happened, both Raghuvanshi and Green were short of the crease as they both hesitated on this run! Raghuvanshi departed first, but the umpire called him back as they found Green not crossing halfway! The decision on the board sends Green packing in the hut! 

WICKET Cameron Green run out Eshan Malinga (Kolkata Knight Riders 74 Runs for 3 wickets)

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Jaydev Unadkat to Kartik Tyagi Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Kartik Tyagi, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Kartik Tyagi plays a defensive forward push WICKET Kartik Tyagi c Ishan Kishan b Jaydev Unadkat (Kolkata Knight Riders 161 Runs for 9 wickets) towards Wicket Keeper
OverHistory.UPDCommentry: EDGED AND GONE!, Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Kartik Tyagi, full length ball, pitching outside off stump, Kartik Tyagi goes for the flick but only manages an inside edge, which carries through to the wicketkeeper. There was a distinct noise as the ball passed the bat. The replays come up - it’s a fair delivery, and UltraEdge confirms a clear inside edge. Tyagi loses a review in the process, and with that decision done, we head into TIME OUT!

OverHistory.NewCommentry: Jaydev Unadkat to Varun Chakaravarthy Wicket
OverHistory.Commentry: Jaydev Unadkat bowling to Varun Chakaravarthy, yorker ball, pitching outside off stump, Varun Chakaravarthy plays a defensive forward push WICKET Varun Chakaravarthy b Jaydev Unadkat (Kolkata Knight Riders 161 Runs for 10 wickets)
OverHistory.UPDCommentry:
RIGHT THROUGH THE DEFENCE AS SRH GO BANG BANG WITH A 65-RUN VICTORY! THE CHASING TEAMS' WINNING STREAK HAS BEEN BROKEN HERE!, Jaydev Unadkat goes straight past Chakaravarthy's defence with a yorker too hot to handle! He completes with a three-wicket haul as KKR are bowled out for 161 runs! SRH becomes the first team to defend the title in the TATA IPL 2026! They open their account with two points! 

WICKET Varun Chakaravarthy b Jaydev Unadkat (Kolkata Knight Riders 161 Runs for 10 wickets)
